title: Cellophane Bags Pack of 100, 5 x 7 Inch Small Clear Cellophane Sweet Cookie Bags, Food Safe, Seal Clear Self-Adhesive OPP Display Sealable Bags for Cookies, Sweets, Envelopes, Gifts, Cards, Pictures
features: SMALL CELLOPHANE BAGS: You get a set of 100 cellophane bags. They measure 5 x 7 inches, makes the celophane bags ideal for holding smaller items. Enough quantities to meet your daily needs. With its re-sealable and flexible design, it can be re-adjusted to any size. Cellophane sweet bags also increases the shelf life of the product and provide better protection.

PREMIUM MATERIAL: Cellophane Bags are made of oriented polypropylene material(opp), which is Airtight, odorless, which keeps it fresh by preventing food from moisture dust, clear bags durable enough for daily.

COOKIE BAGS: These Self seal bags clear sweet Bags cookies Bags contain a widened sealing strip,With self-adhesive design, remove the adhesive strip and fold down to seal, which can be resealed several times, the cookie bags become sealable within seconds without any need for twist ties. The high transparency ensures that you can clearly see the contents of the cellophane bags. And blocks the smell.

UNIQUE DESIGN: These clear sweet bags & cookies bags are flat and rectangular in shape with not easy to split, flat edges, which keep things from falling off. Cellophane sweet bags are light and foldable, which makes them easy to store anywhere.

MULTIPURPOSE: Clear cellophane bags for sweets can also be used for packing jewellery, cookies, candies, chocolates, lollipops, envelopes, cards, pictures and gifts. Use these cellophane sweet bags on Christmas, wedding, valentine’s day, birthdays, anniversaries and other occasions.
description: Cellophane Bags Pack of 100 - 5X7 Inch Clear Small Cellophane Sealable Cookies Bags, Self Seal Adhesive Plastic Bags for Jewellery, Sweets, Gifts, Soap, Chocolates Multi-purpose Cellophane Bags can be used to pack candy / cookies / chocolates / crafts / jewelry / cards / soap / sundries etc. The high transparency ensures that you can clearly see the contents of the bag. Small cellophane bags Perfect for stocking little things and mini favors, great for party, birthdays, weddings, Christmas and other celebrations. Gift wrapping, Bakery package, Wedding Party favor, Home and Kitchen must have Not Easy to Split These Clear Sweet Bags & Cookies Bags are flat and rectangular in shape with flat edges, which keep things from falling off. Keep them fresh These clear cellophane bags keeps it fresh by preventing food from moisture and dust. 【Tips】 1. If you want to use bags for cards, please confirm the size carefully, and reserve some space. 2. Cellophane bags is measured manually, and there is an error of ±3.
